title: Casos Complejos
overview: A region in Peru scarred by corruption and crime, held hostage by criminal syndicates. In the midst of all this: a human conflict between two characters. A district attorney that remains hopeful to achieve changes in society and a young hit-man that doesn't have any other option but to kill to be able to live. What is the background of this young hit-man? How did he end up like this? What role does the law play in this complex plot of crimes and violence?
